mapper.select:
SELECT h.video_id FROM tb_character a
INNER JOIN tb_character_prefer_genre b on a.character_no = b.character_no INNER JOIN tb_prefer_genre c on b.prefer_genre_id = c.prefer_genre_id INNER JOIN tb_map_prefer_genre_svc_genre d on d.prefer_genre_id = c.prefer_genre_id INNER JOIN tb_svc_genre e on d.svc_genre_id = e.svc_genre_id INNER JOIN tb_map_svc_genre_video f on f.svc_genre_id = e.svc_genre_id INNER JOIN tb_video g on g.video_id = f.video_id INNER JOIN tb_new_video h ON h.video_id = g.video_id
WHERE b.character_no = #{characterNo}
GROUP BY g.video_id

SELECT d.video_id FROM tb_svc_genre a INNER JOIN tb_map_svc_genre_video b on b.svc_genre_id = a.svc_genre_id INNER JOIN tb_video c on c.video_id = b.video_id INNER JOIN tb_new_video d ON d.video_id = c.video_id
WHERE a.main_disp_std_yn = 'Y'
GROUP BY d.video_id
